prs.title: Fix CPU 16 bytes alignment issue using equivalent fallback
Clearer type hints and fix rope validation in configs
Fix failing job `Update Transformers metadata` after #43514
refactor: mlinter as its own package
Fix variable shadowing in pipeline example and typo in BART docs (BERT → BART)
fix: split MXFP4 dependency checks for specific error messages
fix: improve processor loading performance by avoiding redundant tokenizer parsing
Fix backward compatibility for full path imports of Fast Image Processors
fix: set `clean_up_tokenization_spaces=False` in Llama 3 tokenizer conversion
fix(i18n): replace broken relative links to awesome-transformers.md with absolute URLs
Add backward compatibility for direct imports from legacy `image_processing_utils_fast`
fix `processing_utils.py`: avoid deepcopying tokenizer in `ProcessorMixin` to improve performance
Add big angry code agent warnings!
LwDetrImageLoss: Fix dtype casting to prevent crash when using amp on cuda device
Fix dtype guessing from state dict
Allow arbitrary template kwargs in processors
Fix VL model rope_deltas batch size mismatch in online RL training
Align lfm2 cache to other mamba caches
[Mistral] Fix query scaling for Mistral4 and Ministral3
Fix core dumped when `NemotronH` is torch compiled
Correct code block formatting in weightconverter.md
[CB] Add an option to return logprobs
Fix and re-run modular converter on examples
Remove cache_position in more models (4 and last one)
[CI] Temporarily skip Mistral4 tests as they almost all fail
[Model] Add PP-OCRv5_server_rec and  PP-OCRv5_mobile_rec models Support
deepseek_v2, deepseek_v3, and modernbert fix for having incorrect tokenizer class on the hub
feat: added cache to the model linter
docs(tasks): remove references to removed question-answering pipeline
fix: XLNet: relative_positional_encoding computes on CPU every forward
Fix: Eurobert model was missing @strict decorator and invalid test kwargs
support xxxFast alias in v5 tokenizers
fix(testing): Fix PaliGemma 2 and PaddleOCR-VL test failures on main
Propagate the model loading from transformers serve to chat
Fix tensor indexing crash in serve generate_response KV cache continuation
Fix bug and add XPU Expectations for qwen2 and jamba tests
Fix missing / incorrect `config` class in some model class definitions
Update Nvidia CI docker file to use torch 2.10
Fix several based models' pipeline parallel support
Fix more model tester missing `parent` issue
update flex attention to use `return_aux` instead of `return_lse` when torch verison >= 2.9
[CB] [Bug] Fix crashes when running without cuda
Fix annotations reader for python 3.14 in `PreTrainedModel`
Another (small) set of fixes required for tiny model creation
fix bug embedding_size mismatch with hidden_size in electra model test
Fix AWQ tests for GPTQModel migration
feat(ci): added a network debug report
[AMD CI] Fix test failures across important models
[Gemma] Update conversion scripts for Transformers v5 Comaptibility
Fix AutoProcessor.from_pretrained silently dropping hub kwargs
Fix `maybe_autocast` crashing on meta device tensors
fix: remove Copied from comments between @torch.jit.script and def for Python 3.13 compat
fix(models): Fix Perceiver interpolate_pos_encoding interpolating to the source size
fix load_best_model_checkpoint_at_end do not load the best model chec…
Fix missing post_processor in DebertaV2Tokenizer causing no special t…
[vllm + v5 fix] handle TokenizersBackend fallback properly for v5
Fix CircleCI summary report not showing due to missing dependency
🚨🚨 Refactor Image Processors to support different backends
Update AFMoE architecture to use v5-style MoE impl
Fix KeyError in convert_to_native_format for dict vocab
Add GreedyLR adaptive learning rate scheduler
Fix unexpected `position_ids` keys when loading OwlViT models
feat(integration): Add KubeflowCallback to enable automatic progress …
Add GGUF support for MiniMax-M2.1 model
Move VLM conversions to the main mapping
Fix ShieldGemma2 non-reproducible outputs by adding _tied_weights_keys
Disable async loading when quantizing on the fly
Add model lerobot PI0 to transformers
Add XPU Expectations for vibe voice acoustic tokenizer tests
fix(models, testing): Fix Llama4 vision rotary meta tensor initialization and MyT5 get_tokenizer signature
fix(models): Forward timm model kwargs to timm.create_model for OmDet-Turbo
fix: cast to proper dtype in EmbeddingParallel
Allow to disable stdout hiding for TP
Remove many output_attentions and other traced outputs on 100+ models
feat: add neuron in tensor parallelism initialization
fix: raise error if mm_token_type_ids not supplied
Fix off-by-one in decode_spans boundary check
Add an integration test for LASR using pipe and chunked decoding
Fix more wrong HF hub checkpoint names
Update agentic contributions guidelines in AGENTS.md to force yielding.
Fix CLI NameError: name 'TypeAdapter' is not defined
Expand model-structure lint rules with a fast AST-based, ruff-like framework
[WIP] FIX Make Mixtral LoRA loading work
Fix Llava tests for torch too!
Fix training ci and clean some tests
Fix UnboundLocalError for tp_plan_alt when tp_plan is empty
FIX Multiple PEFT errors after v5 transition
Fix missing BPE token conversion step in Chameleon
Fix: AQLM quantizer to match updated replace_with_aqlm_linear signature
[device_map] Fix device_map computation by correctly adjusting memory available
Fix PR comment CI for quantization job
Fix error message label and docstring default in load_sharded_checkpoint
[`fix`] Prevent crash with Apertus without xielu installed
Fix zamba2 rotary embedding call when use_mem_rope is False
[Bugfix] fix video inference of qwen3vl and qwen3.5 series
add XPU Expectations for higgs_audio_v2 tests
Fix: Remove references to `text2text-generation`, `summarization` and `translation` pipeline tasks
fix(testing): Fix MoonshineEncoder UnboundLocalError and Florence2VisionBackbone dtype mismatch
fix FSDP loading with meta devices
Fix: Remove references to transformers run command
fix(tokenizer): Only strip Fast from class names in AutoTokenizer if used as a suffix
[tie weights] 🚨 If both weights are present with same weights, still tie them
Fix AMD Docker image build timeout by pinning Flash Attention commit
Fix continuous batching for multimodal models
Fix KeyError in _parse_type_hint when Union contains Any
Fix AssistantTracker.is_active() returning False after activation with empty lists
Fix ansi codes in loading reports when not connected to terminal
Supplement skip logic for XPU in the CPU-only tp tests
Add a new job in `build_pr_documentation.yml` (will be the new required job)
Add MLU bf16 support to is_torch_bf16_gpu_available
fix model parallelism bug for eurobert model
Fix failed unit tests for moonshine_streaming model
Fix position_ids typo in Qwen3_5TextModel forward pass
Update parent module attributes when sharding with TP
Replace placeholder tokens as specified in added_tokens_decoder
[vLLM] Fix backward compatibility with hardcoded subprocessors classes in processors
Integrate the Neuron device to TrainingArguments
fix: Load model with co-located adapter from local path (Granite Speech)
trigger tensor parallel utils test in the CI
skip 1 invalid test case for higgs_audio_v2
Fix GPT2 attention scaling ignored in SDPA/FlashAttention
docs: add Spanish translation for conversations.md (chat basics)
Add future model support for Fouroversix
🚨 fix + tests dense & MoE TP all reduce (decoder only)
Enforce min length in some generate tests
Add Qwen3.5 support for sequence classification
update the expected output for qwen2_5_vl w/ pytorch 2.10 XPU
[ Dynamic weight loader] fix remote code when format matches
Reduce tqdm verbosity during model loading
docs: Add NeMo Automodel community integration docs
Enable Liger Kernel when doing hyperparameter search.
[AMD CI] Add missing timm dependency to ROCm Docker image
[VITS] Add `speaking_rate` as an optionl forward argument
Mamba-1/-2 init weights in mixer class
Fix speculative tests that are flaky with SDPA
Fix mutable default arguments and resource leaks
fix(tokenizer): Fix MLukeTokenizer AttributeError post-v5 refactor
[VibeVoice ASR] Use updated padding cache for ASR model.
skip 2 invalid test cases for voxtral_realtime model
add expectations for xpu for olmo_hybrid model
Fix typos in comments and docstrings
Add testing guide for agents for trainer tests
